creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 204014
py-django-cors-headers-2.5.2.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django-cors-headers to 2.5.2 . 

Changes to the port:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
- Add NO_ARCH

Changelog:

- portlint -> OK
